title: ASR Outdoor 10pc Complete Folding Sluice Box Gold Prospecting Kit for Beginners
description:
The ASR Outdoor Sluice Box Gold Prospecting Kit comes with everything you'll need to pan for gold anywhere, anytime! The backbone of this kit is made up of the ASR Outdoor Backpack Folding Sluice Box for Gold Panning features a 3-piece folding design and a 50-inch gravity fed channel, together creating this high recovery gold panning and mineral collection tool. In addition, the gold prospecting sluice box is easily portable, folding down in size by simply loosening the connecting wing nuts. The sluice box body is designed to lock rigidly in place when the sluice is unfolded; This takes care of the most common complaint about some models that often fold up when you tried to pick them up out of the stream

ASR Outdoor 10pc Complete Folding Sluice Box Gold Prospecting Kit for Beginners

Strike gold anywhere your adventure takes you with the ASR Outdoor Folding Sluice Box Gold Prospecting Kit a complete, portable setup designed for beginners and experienced prospectors alike.

At the core of this kit is a 50-inch gravity-fed aluminum sluice box engineered for efficient gold recovery in rivers, streams, and remote locations. Its 3-piece folding design collapses down to a compact 15" x 12" size, making it easy to pack into a backpack or 5-gallon bucket; perfect for hiking into off-grid prospecting spots.

Key Features

  • Complete Gold Prospecting Kit – Ready to Use Includes folding sluice box, classifier screen, dual riffle gold pans (10" & 14"), snifter bottle, glass vials, scoop, and tweezers; everything needed to start finding gold immediately
  • 50" High-Recovery Folding Sluice Box Extended gravity-fed channel with multi-riffle system increases gold capture efficiency for both fine gold and larger flakes
  • Ultra-Portable Backpack Design: Folds down to just 15 x 12 inches; perfect for hiking, remote prospecting trips, and easy transport in backpacks or 5-gallon buckets
  • Durable Aluminum Construction: Rust-resistant aluminum body with zinc-plated steel riffles ensures long-lasting performance in rugged outdoor environments
  • Pre-Installed Miner’s Moss & Carpet No setup required; optimized gold trapping materials come ready to go, saving time and improving recovery rates from day one

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASROS10PC-ALUM
  • UPC: 810058480316
  • Color: Green
  • Size: 50 in Folding Sluice Box

Built for durability and performance, the sluice features a rust-resistant aluminum body paired with precision laser-cut, zinc-plated steel riffles. The uni-body riffle system incorporates pre-installed with miner’s moss and carpet, so you're ready to start prospecting right out of the box; no setup hassle required.

Unlike lower-quality models, this sluice locks securely into place when unfolded, preventing collapse during use and ensuring consistent performance in moving water. It also comes

This complete kit includes everything needed to get started: dual riffle gold pans for efficient panning, a classifier screen for material sorting, and essential tools for collecting and inspecting your finds. Whether you're gold panning in a local creek or heading deep into the wilderness, this kit delivers reliable performance and portability.

Designed for gold prospecting, mineral recovery, and outdoor exploration, this all-in-one setup is ideal for hobbyists, weekend adventurers, and serious miners looking for a dependable field kit.
